description: Legal deed. In Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: Probably 12th century; more precise dating will likely be possible based on the names mentioned. The document has to do with a business partnership; a shop in a village, 21 3/4 dinars, and a sum to be divided equally. The parties are Avraham b. [..]īm ha-Zaqen and Shelomo b. Shela. The witnesses are Yeshuʿa b. Berakhot ha-[...] and Moshe ha-Levi b. [...].
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
